description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style orange metal cabinet with three stacked compartments, each featuring a black control panel and ventilation grilles on the front. The cabinet has a sturdy rectangular frame with an open shelf at the top, likely for additional storage or equipment placement. The front panels of each compartment are equipped with visible handles and locking mechanisms, suggesting secure storage or access to electrical or mechanical components. The sides of the cabinet reveal protruding handles for easy maneuvering, while the back is solid and unadorned. The overall construction appears heavy-duty, suitable for urban environments such as utility rooms, garages, or maintenance areas. The finish is matte and the surface is hard, indicating durability and resistance to wear.
description: A heavy-duty orange metal cabinet with three lockable compartments, black control panels, and side handles, designed for secure storage or equipment housing in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three compartments with black control panels, ventilation grilles, and locking handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the cabinet and three protruding side handles for maneuvering.
description_view_2: Rear view with solid orange panels and visible locks, no control panels or ventilation grilles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the three side handles and the solid structure.
